{{Infobox character
| name = Dashen
| introduced = [[Of Killers and Kings (novel)|Of Killers and Kings]]
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Dashen]] is a [[Gardener]] whose [[Soulbinding]] was unsuccessful.}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
